name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Tell me your story over dinner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me for dinner? | Friend --

This is your campaign -- you should have a seat at the table for it.

**[That's why I'm taking some time to sit down and get to know some dedicated supporters like you. Enter today and you and a guest will have a chance to fly out and meet me and a few other grassroots supporters for a private dinner.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This campaign isn't about me -- it's about you and what you care about. It's about your stories, your families, and your ambitions. I'd love to get to hear about what matters to you, and I'd love to share with you as well. (I hope you're ready to look at a whole bunch of photos of my granddaughter Charlotte!)

**So enter today for a chance to win, and start thinking about what you want to talk about!**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

P.S. I like running in to pick up Chipotle as much as the next person, but I'm really looking forward to sitting down for a nice meal. **[You really should join me.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/22/15 and 6/25/15. All entries received on 6/25/2015 will count twice. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One Winner and a guest will receive(1) a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI4ODk2NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyMTI0MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Obamatrade showdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Obamatrade is now back in the Senate, and a final showdown is rapidly approaching.

But this President still won't make the Trans-Pacific trade deal public, keeping it locked away in the Capitol Hill basement -- far out of the view of the American people.

Meanwhile, members of Congress are piling on new tax hikes and massive new spending programs to RAM it through and falling all over themselves to hand this President massive new powers.

I'm counting on you to help me stop this madness.

**[Will you please sign your"NO OBAMATRADE" petition and, if possible, agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578165:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)**?

Over the past few weeks, more and more Americans have begun to see why I oppose Obamatrade.

As far as I'm concerned, the American people have had enough of government hiding things from us.

And every time they say it's "for our own good," we've found ourselves in an even deeper mess.

Just think of then-House Speaker Nancy Pelosi who stated Congress needed to pass ObamaCare "so you can find out what's in it!"

If passed, "fast-track" authority would allow trade deals the Obama administration negotiates with the 12 member nations covered in the Trans-Pacific Partnership to pass Congress with a simple majority vote -- instead of the 67 U.S. Senate votes the U.S. Constitution requires for ratification of a Treaty.

I believe in free markets. I believe in free trade.

But given this President's abuse of Executive Authority -- with everything from assaults on the Second Amendment to NSA spying -- I worry Congress is preparing to put the fox in charge of the hen house.

With only a simple majority vote needed for congressional approval of trade deals the Obama administration negotiates, I'm afraid President Obama could gain all the power he needs to finish "remaking America" by imposing a horde of new Big Government policies.

Yet supporters of this trade deal -- who tell you and me we have nothing to worry about -- have never even read the text!

And members of Congress are fighting to tack on "Trade Adjustment Assistance," which creates a massive new welfare system here in the United States -- and dramatically hikes taxes on small businesses.

The _Washington Post_ has already reported that the U.S. economy is "grinding nearly to a halt!"

So massive tax hikes are the absolute LAST thing we need.

Fellow Conservative, it's time for this scheme to be released for the American people.

If the President won't release it and agree to an open and transparent process -- to ensure Americans' liberty is protected -- Congress must vote "NO!"

**[If you agree, please sign your"NO OBAMATRADE" petition, and if possible, please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578165:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578166:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578167:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578168:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578169:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578165:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578170:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578171:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28578172:27441345998:m:1:879035888:423B3EF8B9C323D4CF0D921704021F47:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isJMmxt1ON). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osJMmxt1ON)

name: Rick Santorum
subject: You can do it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=1)
---
Friend --
Our [Guardian Program](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=2) is going great! Yet, I still need your help and support. We are _**7 short days**_ away from a critical FEC filing deadline. This is an important deadline because it will show how many hard working families, like yours, support me and my candidacy. I know we have reached out to you many times, but we rely on people like you, not big business to finance my campaign. I believe in a pro-life, pro-family and pro-worker America where Main Street is valued over Wall Street. This means that I need the continued support of hard working Americans just like you.

Please consider [joining the Guardian Program](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=3). This means that you pledge to raise or give $100 by **June 30**. Whether this is one donation of $100, two donations of $50 or five donations of $20, your support would be greatly appreciated and would go a long way to show America that conservative values matter. Thank you! Rick

[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=4)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=5)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=6).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=7) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_7&n=8).
